# elasticstack_kibana_export_ab_agent (Data Source)

Export an Agent Builder agent by ID, optionally including its tools and workflows. See https://www.elastic.co/guide/en/kibana/current/agent-builder-api.html



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The agent ID to export.

### Optional

- `include_dependencies` (Boolean) If true, exports the agent along with its tools and workflows. If false (default), exports only the agent.
- `space_id` (String) An identifier for the space. If space_id is not provided, the default space is used.

### Read-Only

- `agent` (String) The exported agent in JSON format.
- `tools` (Attributes List) List of exported tools (only populated when include_dependencies is true). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tools))
- `workflows` (Attributes List) List of exported workflows (only populated when include_dependencies is true). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workflows))

<a id="nestedatt--tools"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tools`

Read-Only:

- `configuration` (String) The tool configuration in JSON format.
- `description` (String) Description of what the tool does.
- `id` (String) The tool ID.
- `readonly` (Boolean) Whether the tool is read-only.
- `tags` (List of String) Tags for categorizing and organizing tools.
- `type` (String) The type of the tool (esql, index_search, workflow, mcp).


<a id="nestedatt--workflows"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workflows`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String) The workflow ID.
- `yaml` (String) The workflow definition in YAML format.
